Vendored browser dependencies
=============================

These files are served locally so IFC models and report data are not exposed to runtime CDN scripts.

web-ifc 0.0.77
- web-ifc/web-ifc-api.js SHA-256: b9436f3be6365be57152b30fd32d562a8a9aade85e412e1a2c7ca8fe4219a2c4
- web-ifc/web-ifc.wasm SHA-256: 392b547232aa63df84961d9d3d6e2a7a259cd832b888830cab2ee30778bf28a0
- License: web-ifc/LICENSE.md

SheetJS 0.20.3
- sheetjs/xlsx.full.min.js SHA-256: cc015130aa8521e7f088f88898eba949ccdcbfb38df0bd129b44b7273c3a6f41
- License: sheetjs/LICENSE

html2pdf.js 0.10.1
- html2pdf/html2pdf.bundle.min.js SHA-256: 85e6ee9ce246e3ae4424313f7e46a5ed860a28d757811de8dc9c43f306049d65
- License: html2pdf/LICENSE
